'''zakaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:beachboy|beachboy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-k-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beachboy|beachboy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zakaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zækæzæth|zækæzæth]] || [[word:zækæzæj|zækæzæj]] || [[word:zækæzæsh|zækæzæsh]] || [[word:zækæzæ|zækæzæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zakakazath|zakakazath]] || [[word:zakakazaj|zakakazaj]] || [[word:zakakazash|zakakazash]] || [[word:zakakaza|zakakaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zakazath|zakazath]] || [[word:zakazaj|zakazaj]] || [[word:zakazash|zakazash]] || [[word:zakaza|zakaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zakafzath|zakafzath]] || [[word:zakafzaj|zakafzaj]] || [[word:zakafzash|zakafzash]] || [[word:zakafzaf|zakafzaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zakazatha|zakazatha]] || [[word:zakazaja|zakazaja]] || [[word:zakazasha|zakazasha]] || [[word:zakazaka|zakazaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zakazath|zakazath]] || [[word:zakazaj|zakazaj]] || [[word:zakazash|zakazash]] || [[word:zakaza|zakaza]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zakazathal|zakazathal]] || [[word:zakazajal|zakazajal]] || [[word:zakazashal|zakazashal]] || [[word:zakazakal|zakazakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zakazathatha|zakazathatha]] || [[word:zakazajaja|zakazajaja]] || [[word:zakazashasha|zakazashasha]] || [[word:zakazaka|zakazaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zakazathan|zakazathan]] || [[word:zakazajan|zakazajan]] || [[word:zakazashan|zakazashan]] || [[word:zakazakan|zakazakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zakazathaoro|zakazathaoro]] || [[word:zakazajaoro|zakazajaoro]] || [[word:zakazashaoro|zakazashaoro]] || [[word:zakazakaoro|zakazakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
